<?php declare(strict_types=1); /** * This file is part of phpDocumentor. * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. * * @link http://phpdoc.org */ namespace phpDocumentor\Reflection\DocBlock\Tags\Formatter; use phpDocumentor\Reflection\DocBlock\Tag; use phpDocumentor\Reflection\DocBlock\Tags\Formatter; use function trim; class PassthroughFormatter implements Formatter { /** * Formats the given tag to return a simple plain text version. */ public function format(Tag $tag): string { return trim('@' . $tag->getName() . ' ' . $tag); } }
